D5 Design L4 Analyze Reference

APCA Lc Contrast

the WCAG 3 contrast method — read the signed lightness contrast between text and background and what size it can carry

APCA replaces the old contrast ratio with Lc, a perceptual lightness contrast that respects polarity: dark-on-light reads differently from light-on-dark. Lc runs to about ±108; the larger the magnitude, the smaller and thinner the text it can support.

Set the text lightness and hue and the background lightness. The preview shows live text; the readout gives the signed Lc and a Bronze-tier verdict. Watch the sign flip as the text crosses from darker to lighter than the field.
